'''dhawobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swampdragon|swampdragon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swampdragon|swampdragon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhawobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæwebeth|dhæwebeth]] || [[word:dhæwebej|dhæwebej]] || [[word:dhæwebesh|dhæwebesh]] || [[word:dhæwebe|dhæwebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawowoboth|dhawowoboth]] || [[word:dhawowoboj|dhawowoboj]] || [[word:dhawowobosh|dhawowobosh]] || [[word:dhawowobo|dhawowobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawoboth|dhawoboth]] || [[word:dhawoboj|dhawoboj]] || [[word:dhawobosh|dhawobosh]] || [[word:dhawobo|dhawobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawofboth|dhawofboth]] || [[word:dhawofboj|dhawofboj]] || [[word:dhawofbosh|dhawofbosh]] || [[word:dhawofbof|dhawofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhawobotho|dhawobotho]] || [[word:dhawobojo|dhawobojo]] || [[word:dhawobosho|dhawobosho]] || [[word:dhawoboko|dhawoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhawoboth|dhawoboth]] || [[word:dhawoboj|dhawoboj]] || [[word:dhawobosh|dhawobosh]] || [[word:dhawobo|dhawobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhawobothol|dhawobothol]] || [[word:dhawobojol|dhawobojol]] || [[word:dhawoboshol|dhawoboshol]] || [[word:dhawobokol|dhawobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhawobothotho|dhawobothotho]] || [[word:dhawobojojo|dhawobojojo]] || [[word:dhawoboshosho|dhawoboshosho]] || [[word:dhawoboko|dhawoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhawobothon|dhawobothon]] || [[word:dhawobojon|dhawobojon]] || [[word:dhawoboshon|dhawoboshon]] || [[word:dhawobokon|dhawobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhawobothoro|dhawobothoro]] || [[word:dhawobojoro|dhawobojoro]] || [[word:dhawoboshoro|dhawoboshoro]] || [[word:dhawobokoro|dhawobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
